description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages ci, validation, package, prepublish, and publish, using docker:latest with a docker:dind service for the ci:create job and the custom image registry.gitlab.com/devlife-apps/connect2sql/ci for all other jobs, and define GRADLE_USER_HOME. In the ci stage, the ci:create job runs a before_script to docker login, caches docker/.previous-hash, then executes a script that cd's into docker, checks ./update-required.sh, and if a new build is required builds and pushes the CI Docker image with docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/devlife-apps/connect2sql/ci . and docker push. In the validation stage, validation:lint caches the Gradle caches and wrapper, runs ./gradlew --no-daemon --stacktrace :app:lint :app:detektCheck, and stores the lint reports as an artifact named validation-lint-reports. In the package stage, package:debug depends on ci:create, caches Gradle, runs ./gradlew --no-daemon --stacktrace :app:assembleDebug and uploads the debug APK at app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk as an artifact named ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}-debug that expires in one week; package:release also depends on ci:create, caches Gradle, writes apiSecret=${FABRIC_API_SECRET} to app/fabric.properties, runs ./gradlew --no-daemon --stacktrace :app:assembleRelease, and publishes the release APK at app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk as an artifact named ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}-release. In the prepublish stage, prepublish:tag runs only on the master branch (except tags), is manual, installs fastlane with bundle install, sets up SSH keys, writes ${GPS_KEY} to app/gps-key.json, and runs bundle exec fastlane prep_release. In the publish stage, publish:beta runs only on tag pushes, installs fastlane, writes ${GPS_KEY} to app/gps-key.json, and runs bundle exec fastlane publish_beta with gps_key_path and apk_path arguments to publish the beta build.
